languages.text: {n}Сержант судорожным движением вновь становится по стойке смирно.{/n} "Ваше Благородие, за время выполнения боевой задачи происшествий не случилось!" {n}Он косится на проходящих мимо офицеров, и продолжает очень тихо, так, чтобы слышали только вы.{/n} "Госпожа Драйвстем, да продлит Бог-Император ее дни, очень жалует капитана Зауэрбэка в последнее время. Поручения ему какие-то дает, но какие — не расслышал".

traits.locale_text: {n}Сержант судорожным движением вновь становится по стойке смирно.{/n} "Ваше Благородие, за время выполнения боевой задачи происшествий не случилось!" {n}Он косится на проходящих мимо офицеров, и продолжает очень тихо, так, чтобы слышали только вы.{/n} "Госпожа Драйвстем, да продлит Бог-Император ее дни, очень жалует капитана Зауэрбэка в последнее время. Поручения ему какие-то дает, но какие — не расслышал".

languages.text: {n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."
languages.original_text: {n}Сержант судорожным движением вновь становится по стойке смирно.{/n} "Ваше Благородие, за время выполнения боевой задачи происшествий не случилось!" {n}Он косится на проходящих мимо офицеров, и продолжает очень тихо, так, чтобы слышали только вы.{/n} "Госпожа Драйвстем, да продлит Бог-Император ее дни, очень жалует капитана Зауэрбэка в последнее время. Поручения ему какие-то дает, но какие — не расслышал".

traits.locale_text: {n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

{n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

languages.text: {n}Con un movimiento espasmódico, el sargento vuelve a cuadrarse.{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, no ha habido ningún incidente en el cumplimiento de la tarea!». {n}Con una mirada de soslayo a los oficiales que pasan cerca de vosotros, continúa en voz tan baja que solo tú puedas oírla:{/n} «Lady Drivestem, que el Dios Emperador alargue sus días, ha estado favoreciendo últimamente al capitán Sauerback. Oí que le daba órdenes, pero no pude entender cuáles eran».
languages.original_text: {n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con un movimiento espasmódico, el sargento vuelve a cuadrarse.{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, no ha habido ningún incidente en el cumplimiento de la tarea!». {n}Con una mirada de soslayo a los oficiales que pasan cerca de vosotros, continúa en voz tan baja que solo tú puedas oírla:{/n} «Lady Drivestem, que el Dios Emperador alargue sus días, ha estado favoreciendo últimamente al capitán Sauerback. Oí que le daba órdenes, pero no pude entender cuáles eran».

languages.text: {n}军士再次动作生硬地立正站好。{/n}“大人，执行任务期间一切正常！”{n}他瞥了一眼路过的军官，用只能让你听到的声音继续道：{/n}“德莱夫斯塔女士——愿神皇赐她长寿——近来很是器重苏尔贝克上尉。我无意中听到她给他下命令，但具体内容没听清。”
languages.original_text: {n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

traits.locale_text: {n}军士再次动作生硬地立正站好。{/n}“大人，执行任务期间一切正常！”{n}他瞥了一眼路过的军官，用只能让你听到的声音继续道：{/n}“德莱夫斯塔女士——愿神皇赐她长寿——近来很是器重苏尔贝克上尉。我无意中听到她给他下命令，但具体内容没听清。”

languages.text: {n}D'un mouvement saccadé, le sergent se remet au garde-à-vous.{/n} « Aucun incident n'est venu perturber le bon déroulement de la mission, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame} ! »{n}Avec un regard en coin en direction des officiers de passage, il continue à voix basse, de manière à ce que vous {mf|seul|seule} puissiez l'entendre :{/n} « Dame Drivestem, puisse l'Empereur-Dieu lui prêter longue vie, a récemment pris le capitaine Sauerback sous son aile. Je l'ai entendue lui donner des ordres, mais j'ai pas compris quoi exactement. »
languages.original_text: {n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

traits.locale_text: {n}D'un mouvement saccadé, le sergent se remet au garde-à-vous.{/n} « Aucun incident n'est venu perturber le bon déroulement de la mission, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame} ! »{n}Avec un regard en coin en direction des officiers de passage, il continue à voix basse, de manière à ce que vous {mf|seul|seule} puissiez l'entendre :{/n} « Dame Drivestem, puisse l'Empereur-Dieu lui prêter longue vie, a récemment pris le capitaine Sauerback sous son aile. Je l'ai entendue lui donner des ordres, mais j'ai pas compris quoi exactement. »

languages.text: {n}Çavuş, sarsıntılı bir hareketle bir kez daha hazır ola geçiyor.{/n} "{mf|Lordum|Leydim}, görevin ifasında herhangi bir vukuat olmadı!" {n}Geçen subaylara yan gözle bakarak sadece senin duyabileceğin kadar sessizce devam ediyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator ömrünü uzun etsin ki Leydi Drivestem, son zamanlarda Yüzbaşı Sauerback'i kayırıyor. Ona bazı emirler verdiğine kulak misafiri oldum ama ne dediğini anlayamadım."
languages.original_text: {n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

traits.locale_text: {n}Çavuş, sarsıntılı bir hareketle bir kez daha hazır ola geçiyor.{/n} "{mf|Lordum|Leydim}, görevin ifasında herhangi bir vukuat olmadı!" {n}Geçen subaylara yan gözle bakarak sadece senin duyabileceğin kadar sessizce devam ediyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator ömrünü uzun etsin ki Leydi Drivestem, son zamanlarda Yüzbaşı Sauerback'i kayırıyor. Ona bazı emirler verdiğine kulak misafiri oldum ama ne dediğini anlayamadım."

languages.text: {n}Mit einer unbeholfenen Bewegung steht der Sergeant erneut stramm.{/n} "{mf|Mylord|Mylady}, es gab bei der Ausführung des Befehls keinerlei Zwischenfälle!" {n}Mit einem Seitenblick auf die vorbeigehenden Offiziere fährt er sehr leise fort, damit nur du ihn hören kannst:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, möge ihr der Gottimperator ein langes Leben schenken, hat zuletzt Captain Sauerback bevorzugt. Ich hörte, wie sie ihm Befehle erteilte, konnte aber nicht verstehen, worum es ging."
languages.original_text: {n}In a jerky motion, the sergeant stands at attention once more.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, there have been no incidents in the commission of the task!" {n}With a sidelong look at the passing officers, he continues very quietly, so that only you can hear:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, may the God-Emperor prolong her days, has been favouring Captain Sauerback lately. I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einer unbeholfenen Bewegung steht der Sergeant erneut stramm.{/n} "{mf|Mylord|Mylady}, es gab bei der Ausführung des Befehls keinerlei Zwischenfälle!" {n}Mit einem Seitenblick auf die vorbeigehenden Offiziere fährt er sehr leise fort, damit nur du ihn hören kannst:{/n} "Lady Drivestem, möge ihr der Gottimperator ein langes Leben schenken, hat zuletzt Captain Sauerback bevorzugt. Ich hörte, wie sie ihm Befehle erteilte, konnte aber nicht verstehen, worum es ging."

languages.text: {n}不自然な動きで、軍曹は再び敬礼する.{/n} 「お嬢様、任務遂行中に事件はございません！」{n}通り過ぎる将校たちを横目で見て、彼はとても静かに続ける。{/n}「神皇帝の御寵愛を受けているのは、最近、サウアーバック大佐です。彼女が彼に命令を下しているのを耳にしました。しかし、内容は聞き取れませんでした。」

I overheard her giving him some orders, but I couldn't make out what."

traits.locale_text: {n}不自然な動きで、軍曹は再び敬礼する.{/n} 「お嬢様、任務遂行中に事件はございません！」{n}通り過ぎる将校たちを横目で見て、彼はとても静かに続ける。{/n}「神皇帝の御寵愛を受けているのは、最近、サウアーバック大佐です。彼女が彼に命令を下しているのを耳にしました。しかし、内容は聞き取れませんでした。」
